summary: Backend-only testing for iteration 2 schema upgrades (polygon labels, lines, texts, removal of background_image). Rewrote /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py with 17 pytest cases covering create/update/get round-trips, default values, public share, and backward compat. All 17 tests PASSED against the live preview URL.

minor.issue: create_map still inserts 'background_image': None in DB doc; not exposed via serialize_map but should be removed from insert to keep DB clean.
Newly created doc does not initialize 'lines': [] / 'texts': [] in MongoDB (serialize_map masks via .get default). Cosmetic, not functional.

action_items: Optional: in create_map, drop 'background_image' key from inserted doc and add 'lines': [], 'texts': [] for cleanliness (does not affect API contract).
Optional: CORS uses single FRONTEND_URL origin; ensure preview URL matches the env var, otherwise public/share frontend calls may fail.
critical_code_review_comments: Polygon/Line/TextItem models correctly extended with sensible defaults (label_size=14, color, width, size).
MapUpdate uses exclude_none=True so partial updates won't clobber existing arrays - good.
serialize_map gracefully returns [] for missing lines/texts → backward compat verified by test_legacy_map_without_lines_texts.
background_image successfully removed from response surface (verified in create/get/list/public endpoints).
test_credentials: Dynamic TEST_<uuid>@example.com / test1234 created per run via /api/auth/register
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed; each test creates ephemeral TEST_ users and maps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_backend_api.py covers: auth (register/login/me/bearer), POST /api/maps default schema with lines/texts arrays & no background_image, PUT /api/maps with polygons (label_x/label_y/label_size), lines (id/layer_id/points/name/color/width), texts (id/layer_id/x/y/text/size/color), defaults verification, GET round-trip, public share endpoint including new fields, and backward compat for legacy maps. Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py -v
